name: No Guilt Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt chocolate over very low heat, then let cool slightly.
3. In a food processor, puree all ingredients except chocolate and powdered sugar until smooth.
4. Add the melted chocolate and blend well.
5. Pour the batter into a lightly buttered 8-inch square pan.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until set.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
8. Cut into squares. Makes 16 squares. (One serving contains 107 calories, 3 grams fat, 1 mg cholesterol, 13 mg calcium, 69 mg potassium, 3 grams protein.)
